user_bio: Empowering enterprises to thrive in a digital-first world, Prakash Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (PSSPL) has delivered innovative, scalable, and secure software solutions since 2000. Headquartered in Vadodara, India, and with a team of 200+ engineers across India, the US, Europe, and Asia, we specialize in artificial intelligence, machine learning, natural language processing, generative AI, computer vision, intelligent automation, and Azure cloud solutions.
